title: ASICS Women's Gel-Kenun Lyte MX Running Shoes
description: Cloud-like comfort meets street-forward style in the ultra-lightweight GEL-Kenun Lyte MX. Fusing the fluid lines of the GEL-Kenun series with seat-belt buckle design inspiration, this cushioned silhouette delivers a secure, supportive fit that works with your natural gait to guide efficient strides all day long. Borrowing from the iconic GEL-LYTE III, a split tongue and plush collar make for an easy-on, easy-off trait that doubles as a style-focused detail. Weight: 6.4. Heel Height: 22. Forefoot Height: 12.

reviews.title: Okay for casual, not a whole lot of support though
reviews.text: Cute shoe but not ideal for being on your feet for hours. I work 12 hour shifts and my heels were killing me the first 12 hour shift I worked in them. If comfort and stability is what you’re going for, I’d go with a different ASICS shoe. I wouldn’t ever run in them and I’m looking for inserts/a new work shoe but I’ll still wear them casually

reviews.title: Significantly smaller fit than GR2
reviews.text: I don't understand how the fit can be so different between generations, but it's just too small.  The outside dimensions look the same, but what looks like happened is the new foam is encroaching on the upper and there's just not enough room for your foot in there.  Returned.  Sad, because I liked the Glideride 2 and expected a better shoe, and a similar fitting shoe.

reviews.title: Waited a year of use before my review
reviews.text: To be honest I only bought these shoes from the way they looked (Camo) and only after watching a few viedeos on them.. the price is great.. the comfort is surprising and easy to wear. I weith right at 300 lbs and they support me just fine.. now know I also own Brooks, NB, Adidas, UA HOVR, etc... shoes as well.. are these as comfortable as they are.. No.. but they sure pack a punch bang for the buck thought.. NOW.. One huge issue.;. and again I wanted to wait and see if the soles "scuffed up: for traction.. but no.. If there is rain.. and the water on any surface is thin.. like tile, ocncrete, wood or anything besices most asphalt.. this shoe is like your walking on thin ice.. and YOU WILL SKID! Be warned.. Good.. but Dry use ONLY

reviews.title: Love the idea, needs some redesign
reviews.text: I really want to like this shoe more. I do actually use them a lot but it took nearly half a year to really break them in, and they’re still fairly difficult to slip into, as the opening is not very flexible. The shoe itself is tight enough where the laces don’t even really need to be there, and the toe box is fairly narrow which isn’t very good for running and hiking. My pinky toe often feels wedged by this one part of the design and frequently causes pain. I really REALLY like the idea of this shoe though and it’s still wearable for moderate hikes under 2 hours, I just wish they put more work and testing. It’s probably better for people with thinner, narrower feet. My feet are medium wide and the top part is kind of high.

reviews.title: Fits just right
reviews.text: I like the way the shoes fit; however, they are more attractive in the picture than on my feet, at least to me.  They are a little pricey too, but all in all, I would recommend them.

title: ASICS Men's Gel-Contend 5 Running Shoes
description: Go further than ever before with the GEL-CONTEND 5 extra wide width men's running shoe from ASICS. Created to offer the stability required to help you go the distance this shoe offers a supportive fit thanks to an internal heel counter. Features include a removable sockliner Rearfoot GEL technology and an AMPLIFOAM midsole which ensure your foot remains cushioned every step of the way. The solid rubber outsole and stitch-down toe reinforcement also mean it has a high level of durability while the breathable athletic mesh means that your feet stay fresher for longer as you take on new challenges. Proudly sporting our classic logo on the side you can rest assured that the GEL-CONTEND 5 shoe will give you comfort and protection when you need it most. Weight: 10.25. Heel Height: 22mm. Forefoot Height: 12mm.

reviews.title: Solid support!

As these are made for speed, the weight should tell you these really are made of lightweight materials.
Are there lighter shoes out there?
Well, you're the runner, not me, but I suspect yes, probably.
I also suspect the lighter the shoe, the higher the price and the shorter the life, but what do I know......

reviews.title: Best running shoe  yet!
reviews.text: I’ve tried a lot of shoes - Newtons, Brooks (Levitate), Hoka ( Clifton), Ons, Altras, Topos (Ultrafly), Mizunos (Hitogami), Adidas, etc. and these are the best. Most like the Hokas in terms of weight and comfort but with better arch.  While I still have my Brooks, Hokas, and Adidas in my shoe rotation these are the ones I use for my long runs. - context: 25 to 30 mile a week runner, 3 marathons, ~ 10 halfs, numerous 12 k and under distances.

title: Mizuno Women's Wave Horizon 2 Running Shoe
description:
Introducing the softest, most stable ride ever to come out of Mizuno running. Our new stability technology called smooth ride support is combined with cloud Wave to create a soft, lively and cushioned feel with adequate support and smooth guidance.
Since our founding in 1906, we at Mizuno have taken special pride and pleasure in being able to participate in the exciting world of sports and in making the entire globe the stage for our activities. Each and every one of us is guided by the ideal of true sportsmanship. That was true nearly 100 years ago and is still true today. It is evident in our corporate philosophy which, simply stated, is "Contributing to society through the advancement of sporting goods and the promotion of sports." This philosophy is clearly reflected in our strong support of numerous worldwide sport events and in our dedication to advancing sports through cutting edge technology and research. Our product development strategy is to create products with features that enhance athlete performance and are unique to only Mizuno. These technological advancements make our sporting equipment and apparel go the extra mile and keep you in tip top playing form no matter the sport nor the conditions. Whether it's our Breath Thermo line of clothing which generates heat from the absorption of moisture to keep you warm in cooler temperatures, to our line of Arctic Touch garments that expels heat and moisture generated by the body during exercise to keep your body cool and comfortable, your comfort and performance are at the forefront of our innovation. From the diamond to the track, from the court to the fairway, Mizuno's commitment to Serious Performance shines through. Today, the high quality equipment that only Mizuno can produce are relied upon by athletes throughout the world. We produce superior quality equipment for serious performance, through the artful combination of technology and craftsmanship. Because, at Mizuno, your passion is our obsession.

reviews.title: durable and comfortable
reviews.text: OK, so I was not expecting these to be comfortable for my 12.5hr shifts, nor was I expecting them to be durable. Surprise!! They are both. I am a nurse, enough said about comfort. I got poop on them, washed them in my washing machine, expecting to remove tattered and torn, I found them clean and INTACT!!!!! The color is just as bright as the day I  bought them. My coworkers are spending $150 or more on HOKA and I got these cheeeeap!! I love them!!!! Plus, when it rains they don't squeak????? I was so surprised, I don't know what to say about that. The heel is see thru and there isn't even any water inside after washing them. Sized very accurate, if anything they were 1/2 inch longer than expected. I wear a 7.5 in womens U.S. and these are not tight AT ALL, if I had gotten an 8, which I normally do when buying online and especially foreign, I would have been in trouble. Get them! I am getting another color as soon as I finish typing.

Whether you're running at the gym or wearing on the streets, the new fuel core coast V4 unites convenience and comfort for the ultimate everyday athletic shoe. The ground contact eva outsole creates a lightweight ride while bootie construction has a second-skin feel and is easy to slip on and go.
New Balance, is dedicated to helping athletes achieve their goals. It's been their mission for more than a century. It's why they don't spend money on celebrity endorsements. They spend it on research and development. It's why they don't design products to fit an image. They design them to fit. New Balance is driven to make the finest shoes for the same reason athletes lace them up: to achieve the very best.

reviews.title: a lite duty general purpose shoe
reviews.text:
I hd to send back my normal size, a 9EEE, for a size larger. I've had this variation in size before with New Balance so beware. I'm still giving it 5 stars for style and price.

You may have noticed that price varies considerably with the color sub/style you choose. Mine were only $21 while others are substantially more. I assume construction is the same on all of them? Maybe the price is based on the current inventory? My price dropped slightly after I ordered.

While it is sold as a running shoe (?) and is probably adequate for this purpose a serious high mileage runner would probably pay more to get more. If you can get the right price point as I did they are certainly worth a try as a general purpose/athletic/walking shoe.

title: Salomon Women's Speedcross 3 Trail Running Shoe
description: Salomon was born in 1947 in the heart of the French Alps and the birthplace of modern alpinism. Driven by a passion for skiing and design innovation, Francois Salomon and his son George designed and perfected much of the first modern ski equipment. During the following 60 years, Salomon's commitment to innovative design and passion for mountain sports created a vast range of revolutionary new concepts in boots, skis and apparel and brought innovative solutions to footwear, apparel and equipment for hiking, adventure racing, mountaineering and trail running. Through performance-driven design, Salomon enhances mountain sports by converting new ideas into action and expanding the limits of possibility.

Rubber sole
Heel measures approximately 1.75"
Anti-debris mesh protects the foot from dirt, twigs, and pebbles
Contra grip is designed for better traction and durability on mixed trails and complicated landscapes
Water resistance adds an extra layer of protection from the elements
Lightweight material maximizes comfort, fit, and breathability
Collar shape and sole hardness is specifically designed for a woman's foot

reviews.title: Perfect trail shoe!
reviews.text: Bought these for my wife. Her words are: "I love them"! She says she has wide feet and they still fit perfectly, she wore them all day for a 14 mile mud run/obstacle course and had a great experience with these shoes. Great traction in the mud!

reviews.title: Great!
reviews.text: Love these shoes! So comfortable and well made!

reviews.title: Wife loves them.
reviews.text: I purchased these shoes for my wife as a gift for our trail hiking and she absolutely loves them! Wears them all day now.

reviews.title: Fit great and look good too
reviews.text: I own more than one pair of these, as the fit and support work well for me. They cradle the foot, especially under the arch, and fit more narrowly than many other sneakers (which makes them just right for me). I get many compliments on the appearance, which is streamlined and not at all "clunky."

reviews.title: Awesome shoe, my third pair in ten years.
reviews.text: The best.  Super secure on trail, uneven surfaces, great looking and very comfortable.  I won't wear anything else!

title: New Balance 574D Summer Theory Black/Magnet 8 D (M)
description: Suede/mesh upper ensures a secure fit. Durable outsole provides superior traction and gives the shoe a rugged look and feel. Lace-up closure locks your feet in.
features: Rubber sole

reviews.title: LOVE them but run small
reviews.text: I love this shoe but it runs small. I wear a 9-9.5 in womens so I ordered an 8 in this shoe and my toes touch the front too much. They’re perfect in every other way. The quality is great. Wish they had an 8.5 for me!

title: New Track and Field Shoes for Men Women Kids Boys Girls 8 Spikes 100-400 Meter Running Racing Shoes Professional Sprint Sport Sneakers Track Spikes Distance Running Shoes
features: Rubber sole
*Designed for 100- to 400-meter races.
*Professional 8 spikes track and field shoes.
*Very lightweight and comfortable for running.
*Popular 6 colors and from men size 4.5-12 to choose.
*100% Satisfaction guarantee,send us a message for any problem.

reviews.title: Great for high school sports
reviews.text:
Our daughter who is a soccer player wanted to give track a try and so we didn’t really want to put a ton of money into gear when we weren’t sure if she was going to stick with it.

These shoes really are of great quality for their price. Our daughter says they are comfortable and her track coach seems to like them as well and asked where we got them.

title: Racqua Mens Womens Trail Running Shoes Minimalist Shoes Arch Support Barefoot Sport Shoes
features: 90%fabric
Rubber sole
PERFECT MATERIAL: Upper with knitted fabric, and the sole is a unique high-quality non-slip rubber sole with excellent grip, which can give excellent flexibility and comfort.
FOOT SAFETY: The barefoot shoes with good toe protection, can protect feet from sharp rocks and stones, makes you easily cope with the different conditions.
ELASTIC BAND: The pull tap at the heel of shoes can enter quickly and conveniently, protect your feet from slipping, and quickly adjust the tightness of shoes according to the width of your feet.
VARIOUS ACTIVITIES: These minimalist barefoot shoes are suitable for many occasions, such as trail running, camping, training, hiking, jogging, mountaineering, physical exercises and so on.

CUSTOMER SERVICE: We provide exchange and Money Back service if there are any size/quality issues, make your purchase risk free. If you have any problems with the barefoot shoes you bought, please send an email to us at any time. We will try our best to solve it for you.

reviews.title: do not buy!
reviews.text:
If you're looking for shoes that fit as intended, look elsewhere.
The soles are fine, but the upper is rigid fabric. That's not the bad part. The problem is the heel cup is not a heel cup at all. It stops nearly an inch short of where it needs to be and it's flat at the back. It's not a heel cup. It's flat at the back. WTF!
example: size 9 soles; size 8 1/2" upper with half an inch removed at the heel creating immense pain at the heel.

reviews.title: Shoes arrived late deformed and with a snag in top material
reviews.text: Shoes arrived late and deformed sole stuck out about an inch behind shoe. There was also a snag in material on top of shoe very disappointed

reviews.title: Great Comfort
reviews.text: I put orthotics in this shoes. I walked around a amusement park with them and my feet did not hurt. They are very comfortable. I like that I do not need to tie them. I will buy them  again in a different color.

reviews.title: Comfortable
reviews.text: Feels natural and comfortable

reviews.title: Just what we were looking for
reviews.text: These fit wide feet perfectly!
